overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a dark, futuristic sci-fi facility corridor illuminated by red neon lights and green floor panels. The player approaches a 'LOCKDOWN' warning barrier in an industrial environment with metallic surfaces and corporate signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial corridor with numbered access doors

agents.ego_description: advancing cautiously through the corridor with weapon ready, observing the lockdown warning ahead

entered.detail: metal door with large white number 5 on dark wall
illuminated circular symbol with red neon outline on right wall
large red illuminated sign displaying LOCKDOWN with hazard stripes
transparent glass barrier with metal frame along left side of walkway
angular metal structural beams with red accent lighting
long fluorescent tube lights mounted on ceiling
glowing green illuminated panels embedded in dark floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, narrow industrial corridor with red neon lighting. Door number 5 is visible on the right wall while the camera moves forward toward a distant LOCKDOWN warning sign. Green floor panels and glass railings line the path through the empty facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor approaching corporate signage and digital displays

events.description: digital news screen illuminates on right wall displaying broadcast footage of figures

agents.ego_description: passing the corporate logo signage while continuing toward the lockdown barrier

entered.detail: illuminated display screen showing news broadcast with human figures

segments.scene_description: Moving past door 5, the camera approaches the circular corporate logo on the right wall. A digital news screen comes into view on the right around 24 seconds. The LOCKDOWN sign grows larger in the center of the frame as the corridor continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: final approach to lockdown barrier under overhead rigging

events.description: camera tilts slightly upward passing under overhead lighting structures

agents.ego_description: nearing the lockdown warning sign at the end of the corridor, passing under ceiling structures

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera approaches very close to the LOCKDOWN barrier. The digital screen and corporate logo pass out of view behind. The camera moves under heavy overhead lighting rigs as it reaches the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dark, futuristic industrial corridor that culminates at a restrictive security barrier. It begins in a narrow passage illuminated by red neon lighting and green floor panels, gliding past door number 5 toward a distant lockdown warning. As the camera advances, the view shifts past a circular corporate logo and a digital news screen on the right wall, while the lockdown sign grows increasingly prominent in the center of the frame. The scene then closes in on the barrier as the corporate signage recedes behind the camera, finally passing under heavy overhead lighting rigs at the corridor's end.
